---
title: "Shifu"
date: 2026-07-23
author:
  - name: Cormac Monaghan
    url: https://c-monaghan.github.io/
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <a href="https://github.com/C-Monaghan">Monaghan, C.</a> (2026). Shifu – a modern Typst-based academic manuscript template <a href = "https://github.com/C-Monaghan/shifu-academic-quarto">https://github.com/C-Monaghan/shifu-academic-quarto</a>
toc: true
---
